license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qg8dtzw
title: Culturing Symbiodinium
author: Tingting Xiang

steps_raw.instruction: Dissolve 37.1 g Coral Pro salt into 1L pure water; check the salinity of the dissolved seawater and make sure it is between 32-34. This step of dissolving sea salts may take a while, stir overnight is recommended.
Autoclave at 121 ºC for 30 minutes;

Dissolve 0.4 g casein hydroplysate into 90 mL ASW, and transfer to a clean 250 mL PYREX Glass Erlenmeyer Flask, and cover with aluminum foil; Please note to use enzymatic digest casein hydrolysate, the hydrochloric acid hydrolysate of casein may not dissolve well in ASW.

Autoclave at 121 ºC for 30 minutes; and let it cool down to room temperature. There might be some precipitation after autoclave, filter through a 0. 45µm filter is recommended to get rid of the precipitation.
Pick single colonies from agar plates which contain the Symbiodinium colonies; Image showing Symbiodinium colonies on a solid plate.
Artificial seawater (ASW) is the base for most of the media, except Marine Broth.
Transfer 90 mL ASW into a 250 mL PYREX Glass Erlenmeyer Flask, and cover with aluminum foil;
Add 10 mL Daigo's IMK Medium stock solution to the flask; and that makes 100 mL IMK.
Dissolve 2.56g Daigo's IMK Medium powder into 1L ASW; Daigo's IMK Medium is the base of IMK medium.

Filter sterile the 10X Daigo's IMK Medium solution through a 0.22 µm filter; Here is the recipe of Daigo' IMK Medium, which contains nutrients such as vitamins. Therefore, filter sterilization is highly recommended instead of autoclave sterilization.
Add 10 mL Daigo stock solution to the flask; and that makes 100 mL IMK+Glc medium.
Add 10 mL Daigo's IMK Medium stock solution to the flask; and that makes 100 mL IMK+cas medium.
Dissolve 37.4 g MB powder into 1L pure water;
Transfer the liquid to a new 1L glass container;
Grow the cultures at 27ºC under 10 µmol photons m -2 s -1 white light.
Bring the flask from step 7 and 10X Daigo's IMK Medium stock solution from step 4 to a sterile hood;
Let it cool to room temperature.
Autoclave at 121 ºC for 30 minutes;
Autoclave at 121 ºC for 30 minutes;
Let it cool to room temperature.
Bring the flask from step 12 and 10X Daigo's IMK Medium stock solution from step 4 to a sterile hood;
Dissolve 0.5 g glucose into 90 mL ASW, and cover with aluminum foil;
Let it cool to room temperature.
Bring the flask from step 17 and 10X Daigo's IMK Medium stock solution from step 4 to a sterile hood;
